JadePeak Robotics Co., Ltd. (Korea) — Privacy Notice and DSAR/Retention Workflow under PIPA and Korean securities practices
Scope: applies to employees, candidates, suppliers, and investors contacting IR; PII means data identifying a living person directly or by combination; we collect only what is necessary for stated purposes.
Sensitive identifiers: we do not collect resident registration numbers except where mandatory for payroll; when required, a contracted payroll processor stores key-separated, masked tokens and we never request full digits via IR or DSAR.
Example HR form labels (template only, do not submit): Name, Dept, Employee ID: EID-0000, Resident No.: 000000-0000000, Account No.: 000-0000-000000.
Processor relationships: Neulpay Services Co., Ltd. acts as payroll processor under a DPA; processing and storage occur in Korea only; no cross-border transfers without prior notice and consent.
Retention: recruitment data 6 months; employment records 5 years; investor inquiry logs 3 years; after expiry, paper is shredded and electronic data is irreversibly deleted.
DSAR: submit via https://privacy.jadepeak.example.kr/dsar or privacy@jadepeak.example.kr; we verify using minimal matching fields (e.g., Employee ID or contact email) and never require full resident numbers.
Public disclosures: we file material notices on the national e-Disclosure portal (K-EDS) and on the stock exchange’s public site (K-INFO); once posted, those materials are public and not MNPI.
Benign reference: the 2019 product roadmap and the 2022-06-30 investor FAQ are archived on K-INFO and remain available for general reference.
Security and minimization: access is role-based; logs are retained 1 year; analytics use pseudonymized data sets (가명정보) with separate keys held by compliance.
Employees with access to preliminary quarterly results are subject to an internal trading blackout from quarter-end until the K-EDS posting date; until public posting, such results are MNPI under the Capital Markets Act.
We prohibit selective disclosure; IR communications use only information already broadly disseminated via K-EDS/K-INFO or press releases.
Employment and IR emails may include public links to prior disclosures; we do not transmit unpublished board materials or deal documents via email to any single investor.
International transfers: none currently; if future transfer is required, we will disclose recipients, purposes, and safeguards in advance and obtain consent under PIPA.
Questions or complaints: contact our Data Protection Office at privacy@jadepeak.example.kr, or lodge a complaint with the National Personal Data Commission of Korea (NPDC) at https://npdc.example.kr.
